response:
* The abstract discusses the relationship between astrocytic coverage and glutamate clearance in the hypothalamic supraoptic nucleus.  
* Glutamate clearance is linked to astrocytic coverage, affecting glutamate concentration and diffusion in the extracellular space.  
* Pharmacological reduction or decreased glial coverage around synapses impacts transmitter release.  
* Presynaptic metabotropic glutamate receptors are modulated by changes in glutamate clearance.  
* Astrocytic wrapping plays a role in regulating synaptic efficacy in the central nervous system.  
* The title highlights the control of glutamate clearance and synaptic efficacy by glial coverage of neurons.  
* The title accurately reflects the main findings of the abstract.  
* The abstract and title both emphasize the role of astrocytes in synaptic regulation.  
* *highlighted section* The title is appropriate for the article's content.
